de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io

Class ProofBundleSaver

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.OutputStreamProofSaver
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.ProofSaver
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.ProofBundleSaver

  • public class ProofBundleSaver
extends ProofSaver
    This class is responsible for saving (zipped) proof bundles. These bundles contain all data needed for successfully reloading the proofs:
    • .key files
    • .proof files
    • Java Source files (including additional files from classpath)
    Not included are internal rule files of KeY.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.OutputStreamProofSaver

    • Method Detail

      • save

        protected void save(java.io.File file)
             throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from class: ProofSaver
        Save the proof to file referenced by file. The format in which the proof is stored depends on the class. Thr base class creates a plain output file. Subclasses may choose to use other formats.
        Overrides:
        save in class ProofSaver
        Parameters:
        file - the file to write to
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if I/O fails
